name: Hound Master
description: Optional R.C.C. (GM approval) — elite Hound troop leaders with horns, black capes, speech, minor psionics, and illusion shells to pass as humans. Diabolic or Miscreant only (never Aberrant or good); book discourages player characters except evil or ruthless anarchist renegades. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_hound_master_rcc` (auto-mounted). A.R. 14 vs normal weapons. Typical experience level 2D4+1.

demographics.averageLifespan: Unknown — may live centuries; usually killed in combat

classAbilities.name: Illusion & Concealment Immunity
classAbilities.description: Immune to all illusions and powers of concealment — sees through Shroud Talent, invisibility, and magical or psionic disguise/camouflage.

classAbilities.name: Illusion Shells
classAbilities.description: Psionic disguise: 4 I.S.P. to mask self; 8 I.S.P. to disguise up to five others (typically pass as normal humans). Duration 10 minutes per level (self only) or 5 minutes per level (two to five people). Maximum five Hounds can be disguised on undercover missions.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 2000 ft (610 m). Expert tracker (animals and humans at 80%). +4 on all Perception rolls; +2 on initiative (apply at table — not in racial modifier keys).

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Tracking
classAbilities.description: Smell and track supernatural creatures within 80 ft (24.4 m); base 50% + 5% per level.

classAbilities.name: Self-Healing
classAbilities.description: Heals all damage if allowed to stand still for one full hour (regenerative trance).

classAbilities.name: Partial Invulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes half damage from all non-magical weapons and attacks.

classAbilities.name: Hand to Hand: Assassin
classAbilities.description: Equivalent to Hand to Hand: Assassin with one additional strike/attack per melee round from 1st level (+1 APM in modifiers).

classAbilities.name: Armor Rating
classAbilities.description: A.R. 14 against normal weapons; A.R. 0 against magical and supernatural attacks. Horned exoskeleton and black cape — no worn body armor.

classAbilities.name: Innate Psionics
classAbilities.description: Minor psychic — Mind Block and Empathy at 1st level, plus Illusion Shells above. +2D6 I.S.P. per level of experience.

classAbilities.name: Magic Vulnerability
classAbilities.description: Takes double damage from magic artifacts, magic weapons, Talents, and powers/spells.

classAbilities.name: Languages
classAbilities.description: Speak all languages magically.

classAbilities.name: Darkblade Spears
classAbilities.description: Primary weapon — 3D6 plus P.S. damage; cuts through all known materials. Rarely issued other weapons.

classAbilities.name: Alliances
classAbilities.description: Serve Nightlords and avatars; lead Hounds (20+) or undercover teams of 3–5 Hounds. Sometimes commanded by Dopplegangers or Hollow Men; work alongside Hunters. Renegades may serve other Nightlords, hunt humans, or control street gangs.

name: Snake Bird
description: Optional R.C.C. (GM approval) — sentient feathered-serpent spellcasters resembling extinct feathered serpents; eagle-like fliers with squawking speech and natural wizard magic. Lone hunters or mated pairs; may befriend magicians or serve Nightlords as torturers. Player characters at GM discretion — uses Mystic experience table via shadow O.C.C. `occ_snake_bird_rcc`. Typical experience level 1D6+1.

demographics.averageHeight: Body 4–5 ft (1.2–1.5 m); wingspan 7–10 ft (2.1–3 m)

classAbilities.name: Flight & Senses
classAbilities.description: Powerful flier (eagle-like maneuvers). Sense supernatural creatures within 100 ft (30.5 m). Exceptional vision 2 miles (3.2 km); nightvision 500 ft (152 m).

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Regenerate 5 S.D.C./H.P. at the end of each melee round.

classAbilities.name: Natural Spell Casting
classAbilities.description: Innate wizard-style magic — six spells (levels 1–3) at 1st level, then two new spells per level (equal or below current level). P.P.E. P.E.×5 + 12 per level on shadow O.C.C. All other magic rules as Mystic O.C.C. (no psychic abilities). G.M. may allow spells from Nightbane, Palladium Fantasy, Rifts, and Beyond the Supernatural.

classAbilities.name: Combat — Natural Abilities
classAbilities.description: Three attacks per melee at 1st level (or two by magic); +1 attack at levels 4 and 8. +1 initiative, +5 strike and +5 dodge in the air (+2 strike/dodge on ground); +6 damage on swooping attacks — apply at table in addition to attribute bonuses.

classAbilities.name: Claw & Poison Bite
classAbilities.description: Claws 2D6 S.D.C. Bite 1D6 plus lethal poison: 3D6 direct to hit points first melee round and 1D6 for 1D6 melees unless save vs poison each melee (half damage on success). Affects supernatural beings.

classAbilities.name: Languages
classAbilities.description: Speaks Dragonese (mythical tongue of dragons, elves, and faerie) at 98%. Two additional languages of choice at +20% via shadow O.C.C. picks.

classAbilities.name: Hit Points per Level
classAbilities.description: True H.P. = P.E. + 1D4 per level of experience (catalog `PE+1D4` is 1st-level baseline; add 1D4 each level).
